title: oxydectes glandulosa var. hirta
intro: Oxydectes glandulosa var. hirta, also known as the 'Hairy Fuchsia', is a variety of flowering plant in the Onagraceae family, native to Australia and New Zealand. The leaves and flowers of this plant are used in traditional medicine, possessing medicinal properties such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxydectes glandulosa var. hirta include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
